mapper.select: SELECT id, category_id, name, description, price, stock, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.category_id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.stock, p.is_active, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM products p INNER JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT p.category_id AS Key, SUM(oi.subtotal) AS Value FROM products p INNER JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.category_id ORDER BY Value DESC

SELECT id, name AS product_name, price, category_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY category_id ORDER BY price DESC) AS price_rank, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY price DESC) AS overall_rank, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY category_id ORDER BY price DESC) AS dense_rank FROM products WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY category_id, price_rank LIMIT 1000
SELECT id, category_id, name, description, price, stock, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET stock = #{newStock}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{productId}
